response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics matched the reference song 'Bitter Choco Decoration' perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were fully utilized for transcription disambiguation and semantic translation. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to synchronize with the exact milliseconds of Akirose's vocal onset and offset, ensuring zero cascading delays. One prominent visual text segment (song credits) was captured during the song's intro.

subtitles.original:
ビターチョコデコレーション
作詞・作曲：syudou
subtitles.english:
Bitter Chocolate Decoration
Lyrics & Composition: syudou

subtitles.original: 人に過度に信じないように
subtitles.english: I try not to have too much faith in people,

subtitles.original: 愛さないように
subtitles.english: not to love them too much,

subtitles.original: 期待しないように
subtitles.english: and not to expect too much.

subtitles.original: かと言って角が立たないように
subtitles.english: On the other hand, I try not to cause offense,

subtitles.original: 気取らぬように
subtitles.english: not to act all high and mighty,

subtitles.original: 目立たぬように
subtitles.english: and not to stand out.

subtitles.original: 誰一人傷つけぬように
subtitles.english: I try not to hurt anyone,

subtitles.original: いじめぬように
subtitles.english: not to pick on anyone,

subtitles.original: 殺さぬように
subtitles.english: and not to kill anyone.

subtitles.original: かと言って偽善がばれないように
subtitles.english: On the other hand, I try not to let my hypocrisy show,

subtitles.original: 威張らぬように
subtitles.english: and not to get on my high horse.

subtitles.original: 軽いジョークやリップサービスも忘れないように
subtitles.english: I try not to forget light jokes and lip service,

subtitles.original: どんな時も笑って愛嬌振りまくように
subtitles.english: and to always smile and act charming.

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter chocolate decoration,

subtitles.original: とにかく言わずに酸惨と召し上がれ
subtitles.english: anyway, eat it up bitterly without saying a word.

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter chocolate decoration,

subtitles.original: 食わず嫌いはちゃんと直さなくちゃ
subtitles.english: you really need to fix your pickiness.

subtitles.original: 頭空っぽその後に
subtitles.english: Once your head is completely empty,

subtitles.original: 残る心が本物なら
subtitles.english: if the heart left behind is the real thing,

subtitles.original: きっと君と同じこと
subtitles.english: surely you'll do the exact same thing.

subtitles.original: そこにあるだけ
subtitles.english: It's just there.
